name: Soaked Garri
intro: Before you assemble this snack, you need to “wash” the garri first by placing it in a large bowl and covering it with a lot of water. Wait for any particles to rise to the top of the water and then drain oﬀ. Repeat this process 3-4 times until the water on top of the garri is mostly clear.
method: Add the cold water, sugar and ice cubes. Top with roasted groundnut for an extra crunch.
